lists.4: Test Not Complete Since Last Clear

Status mask.comment: Mask of DTC status to reply with 1 byte

lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal level out of range/zero adjustment failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.151: Component | system operation obstructed or blocked

DTCStatus.testFailedSinceLastClear.comment: DTC Test failes since last clear

DTCStatus.testNotCompletedSinceLastClear.comment: DTC Test not complete since last clear

VIN.comment: Serial number of the car, written at Renault factory

NETWORK_MONITORING.NOKtoOK.comment: Representing last time the A-IVC network status changed from NOK to OK

NETWORK_MONITORING.OKtoNOK.comment: Representing last time the A-IVC network status changed from OK to NOK

Architecture Definition.comment: This data will be set in Renault Plant in order to identify on which type of car A-IVC is mounted

MODIFICATIONS_NUMBER.comment: Whenever the ECALL_SMS_FALLBACK_NUMBER& ECALL_TEST_NUMBER are changed this DID will get incremented.

lists.0: No retry until next ON cycle

lists.1: ROBD Register Activate (ROBD activated, ready to register with national platform)
